hero.eyebrow: Certified installers in the Canary Islands
hero.title: Your renewable energy, built to last
hero.body: We believe energy is free — given to us by nature. We transform it and bring it to where it belongs: every business and home across the Canary Islands.

stats.quote: The energy you consume today defines the company you will be tomorrow.

founder.title: 20 years building a more sustainable energy model
founder.name: Carla Isarí Díaz Ortega, CEO & Owner
founder.body1: We believe energy is free — given by nature, meant for all. Our mission is to transform it and bring it to where it belongs: every business and home across the Canarian archipelago.
founder.quote: leads ESC with over 20 years of experience in the Canarian energy sector, convinced that the islands can become a world reference in island energy transition.

testimonials.title: What our clients say
testimonials.body: When your clients are your best business card, you know you're on the right track.

items.name: Sofía Rubio
items.quote: If you're looking for professionalism, quality and long-term trust, they are without doubt the best. A 10 out of 10 experience.

items.name: Miguel Ángel Sánchez
items.quote: Great professionals — fast, clean work. They handled all the paperwork. I had doubts about the investment at first, but now I'm very happy. I'm covering the consumption of my home and my electric car.

items.name: Ton Pot
items.quote: Very satisfied with the delivery, installation and grant application process. The staff are friendly and professional.

items.name: Juan Monzón
items.quote: This Canarian company installed my solar panels with storage batteries. Fast, clean, they handle all the paperwork and the staff are very professional. Highly recommended.

items.name: Grancanarion
items.quote: Works perfectly. Full solar study and they always respond to any query. No complaints at all. I've had panels for 5 years and on the rare occasion there's an issue, they sort it remotely.

items.name: Julio Rubio Robles
items.quote: Excellent professionals, always focused on the best solution for the client. Tremendously satisfied with the whole process and a real guarantee of quality.

cta.title: Request your free energy audit
cta.body: Discover how to optimise your consumption and move towards a more efficient energy model. No cost. No commitment.
